stemHtml: The operator of a jet aircraft has issued a directive to wash the aircraft's undercarriage and apply engine covers after every flight to the home base, located close to the sea coast. The aircraft maintenance manual (AMM) does not include any such procedure. Which statement is correct?

options.a: This should not be performed, as it is not recommended or described by the manufacturer.
options.b: The undercarraige is prone to corrosion, so regular washing is not going to have much effect.
options.c: The operator forsees the high risk of all or part of the aircraft being corroded throughout the time and this will reduce chances of having corrosion.
options.d: The operator wishes to keep the hangar floors clean.
